_internet_list: Stormworks registers with Steam from the dedicated EXE; Aus cannot call Valve APIs. You need: (1) public IP or correct port-forward on your router, (2) firewall allows the Stormworks ports (UDP; some setups also TCP), (3) Stormworks docs say forward ALL game ports the build uses—often default 25564 plus related ports; match server_config.xml under Wine and these +args. (4) Use ip_bind 0.0.0.0 to listen on all interfaces unless you must bind one NIC. (5) Linux+Wine is unofficial; listing may fail even when direct IP:port works. (6) ASCII server name only (no non-Latin characters).
_comment: Copy to server.config.json next to servers.json (under AUS_CONFIG_DIR). Values become +name, +ip_bind, +port, etc. servers.json launch_args overrides duplicate +keys.
